search_document:
User Request: Suppliers by country.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Suppliers by Country
Type: chart
Description: Distribution of suppliers across different countries
Title: Top Supplier Regions
Type: table
Description: List of suppliers categorized by region
Title: Total Number of Suppliers
Type: kpi
Description: Count of all suppliers in the database

sql_queries.title: Suppliers by Country
sql_queries.description: Distribution of suppliers across different countries
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Country, COUNT(SupplierID) AS SupplierCount FROM Suppliers GROUP BY Country ORDER BY SupplierCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Top Supplier Regions
sql_queries.description: List of suppliers categorized by region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT Region, COUNT(SupplierID) AS SupplierCount FROM Suppliers GROUP BY Region ORDER BY SupplierCount DESC

sql_queries.title: Total Number of Suppliers
sql_queries.description: Count of all suppliers in the database
sql_queries.sql: SELECT COUNT(SupplierID) AS TotalSuppliers FROM Suppliers
